decks.notes: The main concept of this deck is to ramp up mana quickly with the Urzatron lands and use that mana to play big creatures like Maelstrom Colossus and Ulamog's Crusher. The deck also contains control elements such as Candy Trail and Pinnacle Kill-Ship to disrupt the opponent's strategy. The inclusion of cards like Expedition Map, Crop Rotation, and Ancient Stirrings helps to search for key pieces of the deck. Overall, the deck aims to control the game early on and then overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures in the late game.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Clockwork Percussionist, Reckless Lackey, and Goblin Tomb Raider to deal damage quickly. The deck also includes burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Galvanic Blast to remove opposing threats and close out games. Additionally, the deck includes cards like Inventor's Axe and Experimental Synthesizer to provide additional damage and reach to finish off opponents. This deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and consistent stream of damage to secure a quick victory.

This deck focuses on disrupting the opponent's strategy and controlling the board through a combination of removal spells, creature removal, and graveyard hate. By utilizing cards like Nihil Spellbomb and Defile, the deck aims to limit the opponent's resources and disrupt their plays. Additionally, the deck includes a mix of creatures like Crypt Rats and Troll of Khazad-dûm to serve as win conditions and pressure the opponent. The main goal is to outvalue and outlast the opponent by trading efficiently and controlling the game until victory.

This deck focuses on using cheap creatures and removal spells to apply pressure early on while disrupting the opponent's strategy. By leveraging sacrifice effects and recursion, the deck aims to control the board and outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes some land destruction and graveyard hate to further disrupt the opponent's game plan. Overall, the strategy revolves around maintaining tempo, resource advantage, and adaptability to overcome various matchups in a fast-paced format like Pauper 1 vs 1.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board through a combination of removal spells and creature abilities, while also utilizing the Gates theme to ramp and fix mana. The deck aims to stall the game with Fog effects and removal until it can establish board presence and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and combat tricks. The inclusion of Faithless Looting and Pursue the Past allows for card advantage and graveyard recursion, enhancing the deck's overall strategy.

The main focus of this Gruul Aggro deck is to consistently summon aggressive creatures like Boarding Party, Sagu Wildling, Molten Gatekeeper, and Fang Dragon to quickly overwhelm your opponent. Supporting cards like Writhing Chrysalis, Spider Manifestation, and Nest Invader provide additional creatures to flood the board. Lead the Stampede and Winding Way help refill your hand with more creatures, while cards like Rugged Highlands and Essence Warden provide some lifegain to help sustain your aggressive strategy. Emrakul's Hatcher and Raphael, Tough Turtle provide powerful late-game threats to seal the deal.

The deck focuses on quickly and aggressively dealing damage to the opponent using a combination of low-cost creatures with abilities that enhance burn spells. By efficiently utilizing burn spells like Lightning Bolt, Lava Dart, and Fiery Temper along with creature abilities like Guttersnipe and Highway Robbery, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and close out the game before they have a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of card draw and mana acceleration helps ensure consistency and speed in executing the aggressive game plan.

The main idea of this deck is to use cheap, efficient spells to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan. By using cards like Brainstorm, Counterspell, and Dispel to control the board, and Tolarian Terror and Cryptic Serpent as win conditions, the deck aims to out-tempo and out-value the opponent. Thought Scour, Mental Note, and Lórien Revealed allow for card selection and graveyard manipulation, while cards like Deprive and Sleep of the Dead provide additional disruption. Overall, the strategy revolves around controlling the game until the opponent is overwhelmed or locked out of the game.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board by utilizing a mix of removal spells, sacrifice effects, and card draw. The Golgari / Jund colors offer flexibility in dealing with various threats, while cards like Pactdoll Terror and Crypt Rats can help clear the board if needed. The inclusion of Khalni Garden provides additional creatures to sacrifice for value, while cards like Lembas and Ichor Wellspring help with card advantage. Overall, the deck aims to maintain board control and outvalue the opponent in a resource-efficient manner.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy cheap artifacts and creatures, and then use cards like Myr Enforcer and Galvanic Blast to deal damage to the opponent efficiently. With Refurbished Familiar and Thoughtcast providing card advantage, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creatures and burn spells. The inclusion of affinity cards like Ichor Wellspring and Seat of Synod also helps to ramp up the deck's speed and power. The synergy between artifacts and cards like the Krark-Clan Shaman allows for potent combo plays that can end the game quickly.

The main idea of the deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast-paced aggro strategy that combines creature damage with burn spells. The deck focuses on quickly playing low-cost creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker, while also using spells like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper to deal direct damage to the opponent. Additionally, cards like Guttersnipe and Kessig Flamebreather provide additional sources of damage. The goal is to apply constant pressure and finish the opponent off with powerful burn spells like Fireblast and Lava Dart.

The main focus of this Mono Blue Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of cheap, evasive creatures and efficient counterspells. By utilizing faeries and ninjas, the deck aims to maintain a steady stream of threats while disrupting the opponent's game plan with countermagic. With a low mana curve and card advantage spells like Of One Mind, the deck can quickly deploy its creatures and outmaneuver the opponent before they have a chance to stabilize.

The Rakdos Aggro deck focuses on quickly and aggressively overwhelming opponents with a combination of low-cost creatures and direct damage spells. It aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent's life total, utilizing cards like Voldaren Epicure, Sneaky Snacker, and Lightning Bolt to control the board and deal damage efficiently. The deck also includes card draw and graveyard interaction with Faithless Looting and Fiery Temper, keeping the aggression consistent. By combining creature threats with burn spells, the deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

The deck focuses on aggressive creature plays and burn spells to deal damage quickly to the opponent. It utilizes low-cost creatures like Voldaren Epicure and Sneaky Snacker to apply pressure while cards like Lightning Bolt and Fiery Temper provide direct damage. Faithless Looting helps with card draw and filtering, while Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss provide lifegain to stay in the game. Grab the Prize offers additional removal, creating a fast-paced and efficient deck that aims to overwhelm the opponent with constant threats and burn damage.

The main idea of this Rakdos Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent through a combination of burn spells and efficient creature attacks. The deck utilizes cards like Lightning Bolt, Fiery Temper, and Faithless Looting to maintain tempo and card advantage, while creatures like Gurmag Angler and Voldaren Epicure provide a strong board presence. Highway Robbery and Grab the Prize help to generate additional resources, while Alms of the Vein and Vampire's Kiss provide additional reach and life gain. Sneaky Snacker and Kitchen Imp offer additional aggression, ensuring a fast clock for the opponent.

This deck focuses on flooding the board with low-cost white creatures to overwhelm the opponent with swift attacks and small buffs. The deck includes a mix of creature cards that generate value upon entering the battlefield, such as Novice Inspector, Thraben Inspector, and Kor Skyfisher, as well as cards like Thraben Charm and Guardians' Pledge to pump up the team and protect them from removal spells. The goal is to quickly build a wide board presence and close out the game before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.
